name: acid_04_alias_pressure
utterances: Liam is a father of Noah.
Noah is a father of Owen.
If X is a father of Y then X is a parent of Y.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
Noah is a parent of Owen.
Translate this to French: ontology alignment matters.
Explain this: why alias pressure hurts long runs.
